name: Norrland (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: gold, from the Swedish national colours
blue, from the Swedish national colours

description: A white field with an off-centre Nordic cross: a yellow (gold) cross fimbriated blue, the vertical arm shifted toward the hoist.
history: An unofficial flag for Norrland, the northernmost and largest of Sweden's three historic lands (landsdelar), traditionally made up of nine provinces. The design sets the blue and gold of the Swedish national flag as an off-centre Nordic cross on a white field. It has no official status; this SVG (by the Wikimedia Commons user Larske) has been in circulation since at least 2012.

features.symbolism: the off-centre Nordic cross expresses kinship with the other Nordic nations; the blue and gold are the colours of the Swedish national flag, marking Norrland as the northern part of Sweden
